settings_page_desc: Adjust appearance, language, and browser preferences from one place so the panel fits the way you work.
settings_theme_light_desc: Always use the light interface, ideal for bright environments.
settings_theme_dark_desc: Always use the dark interface, ideal for low-light work.
settings_theme_system_desc: Automatically follow the system appearance between light and dark.
settings_color_desc: Change the accent color used across the frontend panel.
settings_browser_list_desc: Higher information density for browsing file details quickly.
settings_browser_grid_desc: A more visual layout for scanning content at a glance.
settings_language_desc: Choose the display language for settings and the file interface.
settings_profile_desc: Manage how your account appears across the panel.
settings_interface_desc: Adjust the overall look and feel of the panel.
settings_current_setup_desc: A quick summary of the display and browsing choices that are active now.
settings_display_name_desc: Set the name shown across the panel without changing your login username.
settings_display_name_hint: Your login username stays @{{username}}. Leave it empty to fall back to the username.
settings_username_readonly_hint: Username is used for sign-in and cannot be changed.
settings_email_readonly_hint: Email is shown here for reference and cannot be changed here yet.
settings_avatar_none_desc: No custom avatar is configured yet.
settings_avatar_gravatar_desc: Use the Gravatar image derived from your email address.
settings_avatar_upload_desc: Use an uploaded avatar optimized for the panel.
settings_security_desc: Manage your sign-in password and review how this browser session behaves after the change.
settings_password_section_desc: Confirm your current password before saving a new one for this account.
settings_password_confirm_mismatch: The confirmation password does not match.
settings_security_account_desc: This updates the local sign-in password for @{{username}}.
settings_security_session_desc: Your current browser session stays signed in for now after the password change.
settings_quick_actions_desc: Jump to the most common appearance and browsing preferences.
